claim: Retail traders lose money not due to intelligence but lack of research process; they guess instead of analyzing technical, fundamental, sentiment, risk, and thesis dimensions
actionable: Use AI agents to systematize trading research: evaluate stocks across 5 dimensions (technical, fundamental, sentiment, risk, thesis) rather than making gut-based decisions
source_title: I Built An Entire AI Trading Team With Claude Code

claim: AI trading analyst with 16 skills and 5 parallel agents (technical, fundamental, sentiment, risk, thesis) generates investment thesis with specific entry/exit, position sizing, risk matrix in one command
actionable: Design agent swarms with specialized sub-agents for different analysis dimensions; aggregate into unified recommendation with specific actionable levels
source_title: I Built An Entire AI Trading Team With Claude Code

claim: AI tools reduce decision-making from week-long analysis to one command; this systemizes research but is a research tool only, not financial advice or trade execution
actionable: Use AI for research acceleration, not automation of investment decisions; always add human judgment; clearly disclaim that tool output is not financial advice
source_title: I Built An Entire AI Trading Team With Claude Code

claim: AI trading analyst produces hedge-fund-quality reports: score dashboard, technical levels (Fibonacci, 52-week), fundamental metrics, catalyst timeline, entry/exit zones, risk matrix with probabilities
actionable: Structure agent outputs as professional reports with scores, technical analysis, fundamentals, risk assessment, and specific trade levels for legitimacy
source_title: I Built An Entire AI Trading Team With Claude Code

claim: Skills.md file contains instructions for all agents and phases; phase 1 is discovery (web search for data), phase 2 deploys 5 parallel agents, phase 3 aggregates and reports
actionable: For complex analyses, structure agent workflows in phases: discovery/data gathering, parallel agent analysis, synthesis and reporting
source_title: I Built An Entire AI Trading Team With Claude Code
